name: BUKIT SEMBA. SUBDI.SD-,50
summary: Bukit Sembawang Estates Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the property development in Singapore. It operates through Property Development, Investment Holding, and Hospitality segments. The company develops and sells residential properties; and holds and manages office buildings. In addition, it operates serviced apartments. The company was founded in 1911 and is based in Singapore.
